goal: Randomize camera intrinsics across iPhone 13/14/15 envelope so the model generalizes across devices.
thoughts: USD cameras have no fx/fy — use focalLength + horizontalAperture + verticalAperture. Aspect ratio must be categorical; independent h/v aperture randomization produces nonsense frames. Resolution changes reinit the render product (expensive) — alternative: fix render res, randomize only focalLength/aperture, crop in the data loader. Log emulated device per frame so Priya can stratify eval. Autofocus = narrow uniform on focalLength within each device.
code:
# 1. Device envelopes (Priya's teardown specs — user to fill in real numbers)
DEVICES = {
    "iphone_13_main": {"focal_mm": <F13>, "aperture_mm": <A13>, "res": [<W13>, <H13>]},
    "iphone_14_main": {"focal_mm": <F14>, "aperture_mm": <A14>, "res": [<W14>, <H14>]},
    "iphone_15_main": {"focal_mm": <F15>, "aperture_mm": <A15>, "res": [<W15>, <H15>]},
}

# 2. Sample device categorically, then narrow-range AF jitter within device
configure_sdg(
    stage="camera_intrinsics",
    sampler="categorical",
    categories=list(DEVICES.keys()),
    per_category_params={
        name: {
            "focalLength": {"type": "uniform", "min": p["focal_mm"]*0.97, "max": p["focal_mm"]*1.03},
            "horizontalAperture": p["aperture_mm"],
            "verticalAperture": p["aperture_mm"] * p["res"][1] / p["res"][0],
            "resolution": p["res"],
        } for name, p in DEVICES.items()
    },
    write_metadata_tag="emulated_device",
)

# 3. If resolution changes choke downstream YOLO: fix render res, log emulated K
# intrinsics matrix in per-image sidecar JSON
lookup_knowledge(query="replicator writer per-image camera_info sidecar")

# 4. Preview all 3 devices
preview_sdg(pipeline="<PIPE_ID>", frame_count=3, force_categories=list(DEVICES.keys()))
failure_modes: assistant uses fx/fy as if they were USD attributes
assistant randomizes h_aperture and v_aperture independently
assistant models 'camera brand' as a semantic class
